make…

making it too much out of focus. It should just gray it, and maybe just the tiniest bit, make it a little less focused, but I want to be able to still.

on the Add Time Entry page.

to only projects I'm assigned for, because I should be auto-assigned to all.

allow me to select a client. Once I do that.
it would know, because in settings, I should have…

what I worked on…

the task I select. And I can multi-select those.

applaud Hayuku.

whenever I first start.

repeating beeps.

started giving me these repeating sounds when I hold.
the control…

beeps.

that happens…

something triggers that condition, and then it's stuck until I kill the app.

implement the gaps that you listed in UI testing?

Okay.

Uh, so nice to work with you.

Yeah, it's good. We're doing good. All the kids are good, which you'll see next, uh, next week, and uh… and their children.

Is that right? Everybody was here? Most of them were here. Whoever wasn't here, they'll all be there next week.
And Becca and I are doing great. She's retired, I'm still working like a dog.
And, uh, uh, writing software. How about you?
Yeah, good. It's a good, um…

Summer's always busy. Yeah.
Doing well.
Everything is… is rolling smoothly so far. Good. That's good.
Yeah, yeah, but, uh…

Two and a half and one and a half.
Yeah, yeah, that's it.
Yeah, and they're all, they're all girls.
Yeah. Yeah, we had 4 boys, we now have 4 granddaughters.
Yeah. It does, it does, and they're just the cutest things, so…
Yeah.
Yeah, thanks.
We'll see you guys in a week, I guess. Okay. At least you can show us pictures of your…

13:20:08

Oh, wow, okay, it's been a…

She just gets overwhelmed and she gets emotional and she reacts before she has a chance to sleep.

It's only, like, whatever it's, like, really.

Exactly, yeah.
David, well, thanks for the, uh, the call yesterday, and we look forward to seeing you. Yeah, me too. Alright, take care, bye.
I will. Bye.

add…

if I'm a super admin.

column. Or… or…

managers and…

you know, he's like a… he's… I said, yeah, Peter would say it's very Hungarian.

He said, yeah, I'm working way too much, and um, and I said, you'll get to meet all the grandkids, you know, we have 4 sons and 4 granddaughters, and he said, oh man.
He says he didn't remember that, so…
So you didn't say anything about your mom?
No, not much. I mean, I just… no, I explained, I told him what the message had said.
Yeah. Okay. Okay.
Disaster averted. Yeah, just normal… normal Hirschfeld kind of disaster.
swings. Thank you, honey.

Wed: May 13, 2026 13:43 PDT — GSD-T v3.26.11 — CURRENT

This is a substantial review with many distinct items — UI tweaks, business rule changes, a major new integration (JIRA/ClickUp + Claude Haiku), a bug report, and some personal conversation mixed in that should be excluded.

Before I route this through `/gsd` and start generating milestones/backlog items, I want to confirm a few things — the scope here spans a quick-fix milestone, a major-feature milestone, and a P0 bug, and how you want them grouped matters.
